refresh_rationale: 0.9.6 baseline refresh: re-benchmarked on local WSL2 (AMD Ryzen 5 5600X, 12-thread) after the HTTP client API/compiler/runtime surface expansion. A later same-day run shifted cli_project_demo.check_ms upward (~205ms) and also moved reference_service.check_cold_ms and check_warm_ms upward (~273ms and ~170ms respectively), while the already-refreshed cli run, incremental-edit, migrate, and request-path metrics stayed within threshold. Only the newly shifted baseline_ms values were updated from the current single-sample use_case_bench artifact captured on 2026-03-07T12:29:43Z.
notes: 0.9.6 refresh: cli_project_demo.check_ms plus reference_service.check_cold_ms and check_warm_ms were updated to the latest WSL2-observed timings. Previously refreshed same-day metrics remain unchanged. Regression tolerances are unchanged.
